items.name: FileContext
items.doc: Shared context for a file being scanned.

items.name: new
items.doc: Create a new FileContext for a file being scanned, detecting if it's a test file.

items.name: is_test_context
items.signature: pub fn is_test_context(lines: &[&str], lineno: usize) -> bool
items.doc:
Check if a line number is inside a `#[test]` or `#[cfg(test)]` block.
Scans backwards up to 60 lines looking for test markers.

items.name: is_const_def
items.doc: Check if line is a `const` or `static` definition.

items.name: is_comment
items.doc: Check if line is a comment.
